TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sililasay, title = Sililasay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sililasay} }

S.FORM: alang Sililasay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Shoufeng, kwara sali buwan nya ga 179 buwan, 508 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 81% kyan ku 414 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 19% kyan ku 94 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 77%, Truku 1%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sililasay hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Sililasay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sililasay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sililasay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sililasay hya' ga Siapaluway. tay mkyahu' na Sililasay hya' ga Cipuypuyan. tay 'zil na Sililasay hya' ga Tdlu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Sililasay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Shoufeng, kwara sali buwan nya ga 179 buwan, 508 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 81% kyan ku 414 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 19% kyan ku 94 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 77%, Truku 1%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sililasay hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Sililasay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sililasay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sililasay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sililasay hya' ga Siapaluway. tay mkyahu' na Sililasay hya' ga Cipuypuyan. tay 'zil na Sililasay hya' ga Tdlu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč s~…ēililas~…ēaj …£a nija mki s~…ēku kariŇč keŇč atu s~…ēńßou*eŇč, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, truku *%, pajwan *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, Ňčas~…ēal ps~…ēatu te…£ami ru pqniqan iju. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na s~…ēililas~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a ő≤s~…ēiluŇč. taj Ēzil na s~…ēililas~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na s~…ēililas~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēililas~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēililas~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēiapaluwaj. taj mkjańßu Ē na s~…ēililas~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ipujpujan. taj Ēzil na s~…ēililas~…ēaj ńßja Ē …£a t*lu. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
